text:
____________________7 7
It is due to this importance of Gulika in 'verifying the
accuracy of BT (given or rectified)' that Gulika became
important and astrologers started marking Gulika in
horoscopes. Position of Gulika and Gulika navamsa is
supposed to help the astrologer in verifying whether given
horoscope is correct.
Demerits of Gulika method
I) It is not a birth rectification method, but only a Lagna
verification method, which may help to ensure that the
given natal chart, or given/rectified BT is correct.
2) The actual results (horoscopes at hand) does not seem to
tally fully with the hypothesis.
3) Logically the method does not seem to be acceptable, since
Gulika is a fixed point for day and night and accepting
this will limit the possible birth times to a great extend,
which does not seem to tally with the facts. [But still this
is an open area for research]
Looking back
Even though five methods that are popularly accepted for
